skills: Synthetic organic chemist with experience in complete characterization of large and small organic compounds by NMR, IR, UV-visible spectroscopy, LC-MS, GPC, HPLC, TGA, DSC, Rheology techniques.

Carried out the supervision of undergraduate project students and tutoring of chemistry students with practical demonstrations performed for both graduate and undergraduate students. Gained experience by working in collaboration with research groups in varied fields and locations

Possess good presentation and communication skills along with being an experienced user of MS Word, Powerpoint, Excel, Origin, NMR softwares (Topspin, Mestrec) and chemical data search system such as Scifinder.
